personal.preferred_title: Cloud Data Engineer | AWS, Python, SQL & ETL Pipelines

summary: Cloud Data Engineer with deep hands-on experience building Python and SQL-based ETL pipelines, AWS data workflows, and analytics-ready datasets. Strong background with AWS S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, PySpark, data warehousing, pipeline troubleshooting, data quality, and reporting enablement. Experienced supporting fast-moving enterprise teams with reliable, scalable data platforms and clean datasets for downstream analytics and decision-making.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, transforming raw operational data into reporting-ready datasets.
Developed AWS-based data workflows using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue for ETL, Athena querying, and Redshift-backed forecasting and analytics workloads.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas and historical data models to support retention, trend analysis, executive reporting, and downstream analytics.
Implemented data quality, cleansing, and validation checks across telemetry pipelines to improve reporting trust and operational reliability.
Built Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly dashboards that surfaced capacity trends and performance insights for senior stakeholders.
Containerized Python ETL jobs on EC2/ECS to support scalable on-demand batch processing for capacity and forecasting workloads.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, supporting operational reporting and performance analytics.
Led the FAST project to data-mine real-user performance metrics from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring and provide optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Participated in AWS cloud migration planning by evaluating monitoring tools, data collection needs, and application performance readiness.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Built Perl/Korn Shell automation scripts for data extraction and recurring performance reporting, reducing manual weekly export effort.
Managed large-scale CA APM environments with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents across enterprise systems.
Designed dashboards, alerts, and SLA thresholds adopted as reporting and monitoring standards across client environments.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting, Java, C++
skills.Tools & Infra: Airflow, Docker, Git, Linux/Unix, BMC TrueSight / TSCO, AppDynamics, Dynatrace, CA APM / Introscope

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed an AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark for scalable ETL processing, analytics-ready datasets, and optimized data access. Addressed small-file processing challenges using Parquet and Snappy compression patterns for enterprise-scale reporting workloads.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built Python and PySpark data pipelines feeding forecasting workflows and Streamlit dashboards for infrastructure capacity analysis. Reduced forecasting cycles by 90% while producing reliable datasets for reporting and planning.
